name: Integration Testing + End-to-End Verification
observations: Two DuckDB files in use: career-hotline-calls (webhook/call-logger) and career-coaching-calls (intake-webhook). Both function correctly but have schema divergence in escalations and feedback tables.
All 150+ concept map aliases resolve to existing files on disk (20+ unique knowledge base files).
Phone normalization handles all tested formats including international numbers.
Tool handler classification logic correctly routes all 5 career stages plus edge cases (calibration detection, pain point identification).
recommendations_for_next_drops: D5.1 can proceed — all components verified functional.
Consider consolidating the two DuckDB files into one to avoid schema drift.
Consider harmonizing the escalations and feedback table schemas across both DBs.
